# NIP-56 Reference Card

kind: 1984, optional event. Tags: p (required, pubkey), e (required for notes, note id), x (optional, info hash of blob), report type (required, one of: nudity, malware, profanity, illegal, spam, impersonation, other). Filter patterns: l, L tags for qualification and querying. JSON example: {"kind": 1984, "tags": [["p", "<pubkey>", "nudity"]], "content": ""}.
